title: Heliophile
description: Working across US, Poland, India, and China means I catch sunrises and sunsets in every time zone. Chasing golden hour is my reset button.

title: Tinkerer
description: From exploring new dev tools to weekend hardware experiments — I learn by building, even outside work hours.

title: Speaker & Host
description: President of Toastmasters, Design Thinking facilitator, and developing my voice as a technical host and presenter.
